description:
Hosted deployment: set up web app on Vercel or similar

Deploy the web app to a hosted environment so users can try MythxEngine without downloading the desktop app:\\n\\n- Deploy Next.js app to Vercel (or Railway/Fly.io if server-side features need it)\\n- Configure environment variables (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY for demo, or require user's own key)\\n- Set up database (SQLite → Turso/Neon for hosted)\\n- Configure CORS and security headers\\n- Set up monitoring and logging\\n- Performance testing under load
title: [linear] Hosted deployment: set up web app on Vercel or similar
